LanguageData.TW_Mech_Paratrooper.label: Gestate Mech Paratrooper.
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Paratrooper.description: A medium-sized mass-produced elite mechanoid unit. Equipped with a specialized jump-jet propulsion system, the Paratrooper Silent Mantis variant can deploy offensive fragmentation-flash grenades that deliver both disorienting stun effects and shrapnel damage against all target classifications.
